# AgentRouter OS

> CLI-first AI task routing planner that classifies your task across 7 dimensions and recommends the best model, agent, or tool with explainable scoring. Local-first with no cloud dependencies — everything is stored in SQLite with full decision replay and team policy support.

Key features:
- Task classification across 7 dimensions (type, complexity, risk, context, output, tools, approval)
- YAML-driven model registry with live provider sync (OpenRouter, OpenAI)
- Scoring-based recommendations with plain-English reasoning
- SQLite decision log with full replay and feedback learning
- Risk-aware gating and safety checklists
- Local web dashboard with decision history and stats
- Opt-in execution with high-risk auto-blocking
- Team mode via shared `AGENTROUTER_HOME` with unified policy

## Getting Started

- [Quick Start with Installation](https://github.com/krish17kp/AgentRouter-OS/blob/main/README.md#quick-start): Setup from scratch in 5 minutes
- [Common Tasks](https://github.com/krish17kp/AgentRouter-OS/blob/main/README.md#common-tasks): Route tasks, refresh catalog, view decisions, run execution
- [Understanding the Output](https://github.com/krish17kp/AgentRouter-OS/blob/main/README.md#understanding-the-output): Task classification, scoring, recommendations explained
- [Troubleshooting](https://github.com/krish17kp/AgentRouter-OS/blob/main/README.md#troubleshooting): Common issues with solutions and exit codes

## Core Documentation

- [USER_GUIDE.md](https://github.com/krish17kp/AgentRouter-OS/blob/main/USER_GUIDE.md): Full command walkthrough, JSON output contract, all flags and options
- [CLI_SPEC.md](https://github.com/krish17kp/AgentRouter-OS/blob/main/CLI_SPEC.md): Complete command specification and argument details
- [ROUTING_RULES.md](https://github.com/krish17kp/AgentRouter-OS/blob/main/ROUTING_RULES.md): Classification logic, scoring formula, risk rules, fallback strategy

## Configuration and Registry

- [MODEL_REGISTRY_SCHEMA.md](https://github.com/krish17kp/AgentRouter-OS/blob/main/MODEL_REGISTRY_SCHEMA.md): Model entry schema (source of truth) with all required and optional fields
- [PROVIDER_ADAPTER_SPEC.md](https://github.com/krish17kp/AgentRouter-OS/blob/main/PROVIDER_ADAPTER_SPEC.md): Adapter contract for 6 providers with execution config
- [README — Model Registry and Configuration](https://github.com/krish17kp/AgentRouter-OS/blob/main/README.md#model-registry-and-configuration): How to add models, curate ability scores, disable models

## Architecture and Design

- [ARCHITECTURE.md](https://github.com/krish17kp/AgentRouter-OS/blob/main/ARCHITECTURE.md): Components, request lifecycle, data flow diagrams
- [README — Architecture & Design](https://github.com/krish17kp/AgentRouter-OS/blob/main/README.md#architecture--design): Design principles, no-hardcoding philosophy, reversibility
- [SECURITY.md](https://github.com/krish17kp/AgentRouter-OS/blob/main/SECURITY.md): Secret handling, privacy notes, safety design, reporting vulnerabilities
